zh.Thorpe, Derbyshire, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾索普
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Skipwith於大約1225年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾貝斯比時，他的父親William de Skipwith23歲，母親Alice Thorpe21歲。他於1248年與Isabelle Arches在英國林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1325年之後在英國英格蘭德比夏爾索普。

zh-hans.Thorpe, Derbyshire, England: 英国英格兰德比夏爾索普
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Skipwith于大约1225年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾貝斯比时，他的父亲William de Skipwith23岁，母亲Alice Thorpe21岁。他于1248年与Isabelle Arches在英国林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1325年之后在英国英格兰德比夏爾索普。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Skipwith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: The main Skipwith family held the manor of Skipwith in England in the early Middle Ages, and direct descendants can be traced to the present day. In the 13th century they moved from Yorkshire to Lincolnshire, where their principal seat was at southern Ormsby. In the early 17th century there was further migration, to Leicestershire, Warwickshire, and across the Atlantic to VA. Other bearers of the name seem to have been tenants of Lincolnshire manors held by the Skipworth family, and to have taken the surname of their overlords.

variants.name: Skipworth
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): habitational name from Skipwith (East Yorkshire), from Old Northumbrian scīp (Old English scēap ‘sheep’), + Old English wīc ‘dwelling, specialized farm’, later replaced by Old Norse vithr ‘wood’; initial Sk-, instead of Sh-, is also due to Scandinavian influence.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Skipwith was born about 1225, in Beesby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Skipwith, was 23 and his mother, Alice Thorpe, was 21. He married Isabelle Arches in 1248, in Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died after 1325, in Thorpe, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Skipwith est né environ 1225, à Beesby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Skipwith, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Alice Thorpe, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle Arches en 1248, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1325, à Thorpe, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Skipwith um 1225 in Beesby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Skipwith 23 und seine Mutter Alice Thorpe 21. Er hat 1248 in Lincolnshire, England Isabelle Arches geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1325 in Thorpe, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Skipwith è nato il circa 1225 nel Beesby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Skipwith, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Alice Thorpe, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle Arches nel 1248, nel Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1325, nel Thorpe, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Skipwithが約1225年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアビースビーで生まれた時，父William de Skipwithは23歳，母Alice Thorpeは21歳であった。1248年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでIsabelle Archesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1325年以後にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアソルペで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Skipwith(이)가 대략 1225년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 브이스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Skipwith(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Thorpe(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1248년 영국 링코실르에서 Isabelle Arches(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1325년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 소에서 사망했다.

mn.Thorpe, Derbyshire, England: Thorpe, Deorbyscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Skipwith nasceu aproximadamente 1225, em Beesby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Skipwith, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Alice Thorpe, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle Arches em 1248, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 1325, em Thorpe, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Skipwith родился около 1225 г. в местности бисби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Skipwith было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Thorpe, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle Arches в 1248 г. в местности линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1325 г. в местности таурп, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.Abt 1225–Aft 1325: e tusa o le 1225–ina ua ma'ea le 1325

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Skipwith nació aproximadamente 1225, en Beesby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Skipwith, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Alice Thorpe, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Isabelle Arches en 1248, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1325, en Thorpe, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
